basic_details.job_title: District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 05 vacancies have been announced through the District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than Seven Years continuous practice, sufficient experience in conducting Criminal Cases under the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989 (Central Act 33 of 1989)
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than Seven Years continuous practice. Sufficient experience in conducting Criminal Cases, specifically under the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989 (Central Act 33 of 1989).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Collectorate Tiruvallur Eminent Senior Advocates recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Eminent Senior Advocates?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the post of Eminent Senior Advocates in the District Collectorate Tiruvallur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for an Eminent Senior Advocate?
faq.answer: Candidates must have at least seven years of continuous practice as an Advocate and sufficient experience in conducting Criminal Cases, particularly those under the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Eminent Senior Advocates post is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Eminent Senior Advocates posts will be based on application-based empanelment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Collectorate Tiruvallur. The link will be provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: The application must be submitted offline, likely through Speed Post or Registered Post, to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.
